title: When I Say Forever
description: Exploring eternal love and trust in relationships.
lyrics: Mean forever like the sun and the moon Shining on each other and to help each other Like the way for the next two When I say forever, I Mean forever like you and me In this circle, this rotation This whirling vortex of love and fantasy I never meant to say like forever For you to know that I can be there I meant to say forever for you to understand that we can both be there That it's a team that comes together A team that makes it all possible Me and you together, we just communicate We can do the impossible You gotta believe me here Because you haven't trusted me once this whole entire time As Kendrick said, rather you trust in love But what is love without trust? Is it really love? Cause when I say forever, I Mean forever like the moon and the sun Following each other's paths around the blackened So we can take the love, find what we're here to Dream and bend and understand Gnostic energy, my fam, I Hope you see the light beyond What you saw before cause When I say forever, I Mean forever like the sun and the moon When I say forever, I Mean forever like the sun and the moon I need you coming up behind me Light my way Need you to light my way Light my way I know there's more for you Inside of the design I know you've got more pressure Now that you can't find a way When I say forever, I Mean forever sun, moon, design Like it's just treasure A treasure of a better Better way with sparkling gold Don't hate the way we fold When I say forever, I Mean forever Like rings and diamonds burst at the seams We all go away But our memory lasts through dreams When I say forever, I Mean forever like the sun and the moon When I say forever, I Mean forever like the sun and the moon Timeless bodies just Going after each other Finding light, finding Bringing happiness together Working all the way through the Problems and disguises in our life I know that's what I mean when I say Forever Forever I'm with you Forever My mind sees you And contemplates the Weight of that remark Tells you not to fall apart Please don't fall apart Forever

lyricsSegments.text: Mean forever like the sun and the moon
Shining on each other and to help each other
Like the way for the next two
When I say forever, I
Mean forever like you and me
In this circle, this rotation
This whirling vortex of love and fantasy
I never meant to say like forever
For you to know that I can be there
I meant to say forever for you to understand that we can both be there
That it's a team that comes together
A team that makes it all possible
Me and you together, we just communicate
We can do the impossible
You gotta believe me here
Because you haven't trusted me once this whole entire time
As Kendrick said, rather you trust in love
But what is love without trust?
Is it really love?
Cause when I say forever, I
Mean forever like the moon and the sun
Following each other's paths around the blackened
So we can take the love, find what we're here to
Dream and bend and understand
Gnostic energy, my fam, I
Hope you see the light beyond
What you saw before cause
When I say forever, I
Mean forever like the sun and the moon
When I say forever, I
Mean forever like the sun and the moon
I need you coming up behind me
Light my way
Need you to light my way
Light my way
I know there's more for you
Inside of the design
I know you've got more pressure
Now that you can't find a way
When I say forever, I
Mean forever sun, moon, design
Like it's just treasure
A treasure of a better
Better way with sparkling gold
Don't hate the way we fold
When I say forever, I
Mean forever
Like rings and diamonds burst at the seams
We all go away
But our memory lasts through dreams
When I say forever, I
Mean forever like the sun and the moon
When I say forever, I
Mean forever like the sun and the moon
Timeless bodies just
Going after each other
Finding light, finding
Bringing happiness together
Working all the way through the
Problems and disguises in our life
I know that's what I mean when I say
Forever
Forever I'm with you
Forever
My mind sees you
And contemplates the
Weight of that remark
Tells you not to fall apart
Please don't fall apart
Forever
